author: FIOS
text: Liverpool 2026/27 Season - Iraola Officially Confirmed18 minutes agoReplyQuoteSelect PostDeselect PostLink to PostMemberGive GiftBack to TopPost by FIOS on18 minutes ago3 hours agoSreddersaid:4 hours agoBrummieRedsaid:Salah would have loved the new training methods! 😂If Salah knew Slot would be sacked and replaced by Iraola...perhaps he would have stayed.Lovren spoke about this recently. He said he knows for certain that Mo would have stayed if he knew Slot was being sacked but the timing of everything was bad.I think we're all in agreement that Mo bailed out because of Slot. You could tell in that last few weeks and the last game itself that the man was never ready to leave the club.But I think it's done now.
